title: hypericum perfoliatum
intro: Hypericum perfoliatum, also known as the cup plant or common cup plant, is a perennial herb native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains hyperforin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hypericum perfoliatum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to promote healing and reduce symptoms.
